end.$description: End color for AI aura gradient effect. Creates a fade-to-transparent effect at the edge of AI-enhanced elements.

background.$description: Background color for AI aura on hover. Use when user hovers over AI-enhanced interactive elements.

end.$description: End color for AI aura gradient on hover. Creates hover state fade effect for AI elements.

start.$description: Start color for AI aura gradient on hover. Provides the vibrant blue beginning of the hover gradient.
Start color for AI aura gradient effect. Provides the vibrant blue beginning of the gradient for AI-enhanced elements.

sm.$description: Start color for small AI aura gradient. Use for compact AI indicators or smaller UI elements.

end.$description: End color for AI border gradient. Creates the lighter edge of gradient borders on AI elements.

start.$description: Start color for AI border gradient. Creates the darker edge of gradient borders on AI elements.

strong.$description: Strong border color for AI elements. Use for high-emphasis AI borders that need clear definition.

shadow.$description: Drop shadow color for AI elements. Provides depth and elevation for AI-enhanced components.
Inner shadow color for AI elements. Creates inset depth effect for AI-enhanced surfaces.

overlay.$description: Overlay color for AI modal backgrounds. Use to dim content behind AI dialogs or popovers.

background.$description: Background color for AI popovers and tooltips. Provides the base surface for AI-generated content displays.

bottom.$description: Bottom caret color for AI popovers. Creates the gradient pointer at the bottom of AI tooltips.

background.$description: Background color for bottom caret of AI popovers. Provides the base color for the popover pointer.

actions.$description: Background color for action area in AI popover bottom caret. Use for interactive sections within AI tooltips.

center.$description: Center color for AI popover caret gradient. Creates the vibrant middle of the gradient pointer.

01.$description: Primary outer shadow for AI popovers. Provides the first layer of depth for elevated AI elements.

02.$description: Secondary outer shadow for AI popovers. Adds additional depth layer for AI element elevation.

background.$description: Background color for AI skeleton loaders. Use while AI-generated content is loading.
Element background color for AI skeleton loaders. Provides the animated shimmer effect for loading AI content.
Default page background color. Use as the base surface for the entire application or page.

active.$description: Background color for active/pressed state. Use when user clicks or presses interactive elements.

brand.$description: Brand color for backgrounds. Use for branded sections, headers, or promotional areas.

hover.$description: Background color for hover state. Use when user hovers over interactive elements to provide visual feedback.

inverse.$description: Inverse background color for dark UI elements. Use for tooltips, inverse buttons, or dark-themed sections.

hover.$description: Hover state for inverse backgrounds. Use when user hovers over dark UI elements.

selected.$description: Background color for selected state. Use to highlight currently selected items or active states.

hover.$description: Hover state for selected backgrounds. Use when user hovers over already-selected items.

disabled.$description: Border color for disabled elements. Use when borders need to indicate unavailable or inactive state.

interactive.$description: Border color for interactive elements. Use for focused inputs, active selections, or clickable borders.

inverse.$description: Border color for inverse/dark UI elements. Use for borders on dark backgrounds or inverse components.
